title: Who We Are
content:
At https://clensycleaning.com, we are committed to maintaining the trust and confidence of all visitors to our website. We value your privacy, and we want you to know that https://clensycleaning.com is not in the business of selling, renting, or trading email lists with other companies or businesses for marketing purposes.

In this Privacy Policy, we provide detailed information on when and why we collect personal information, how we use it, the limited conditions under which we may disclose it to others, and how we keep it secure. We take your privacy seriously and implement measures to ensure a safe and secure environment for all visitors and users of https://clensycleaning.com.

title: Information We Collect
content:
We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when you use our services, interact with our website, or communicate with us. This may include, but is not limited to:

• Name
• Email address
• Phone number
• Mailing address
• Payment information (for transactions)
• Usage data (cookies, IP address, browser details)

title: How We Use Your Information
content:
Your personal information is used for the following purposes:

• To process and manage your cleaning service appointments
• To communicate with you regarding services, promotions, and updates
• To send appointment reminders, payment reminders, and post-service feedback requests
• To improve our website functionality and user experience
• To comply with legal obligations

title: Sharing Your Information
content:
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes. However, we may share your personal data with the following:

• Service providers or third-party vendors who assist in delivering our services (e.g., payment processors, email service providers, or customer support systems)
• Law enforcement or government authorities when required by law

title: SMS Consent and Third-Party Sharing
content:
By providing your phone number to Clensy Cleaning, you are consenting to receive SMS messages related to the services you've requested, such as appointment reminders, service confirmations, and promotions. Your SMS consent will not be shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

We will use SMS messaging only for the services you have opted into, and you can opt-out at any time by replying "STOP" to any SMS message.

title: Cookies
content: We may use cookies to provide services and enhance your experience on our website. Cookies allow us to track user activity and improve our content. You can clear cookies at any time by adjusting your browser settings.

title: Google Analytics
content: We use Google Analytics to analyze website traffic and user behavior. This helps us understand how our website is used and identify areas for improvement. Google Analytics collects data in an anonymous manner, and we do not attempt to identify individuals.

title: Website Comments
content: If you leave comments on our website, we collect the details you provide (such as name, email address, and website) to display your comment. These details are stored for display purposes and are not verified by us.

title: Access to Your Personal Information
content: You have the right to view, amend, or delete any personal information we hold about you. To request access or make changes, please contact our data protection officer at Info@clensycleaning.com, and we will assist you in removing or correcting your information.

title: Changes to Our Privacy Policy
content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When changes are made, we will update this page with the revised version. If we make significant changes, we will notify you via email or through the website. By continuing to use our services, you agree to the terms of the updated policy.

title: Privacy Policy Link for SMS Use
content:
To comply with carrier requirements, your privacy policy must be easily accessible. Ensure you include a prominent link to this Privacy Policy near consent language on your website or in forms where users opt-in for SMS messaging, such as:

"By opting in for SMS messages, you agree to receive SMS updates and reminders related to Clensy Cleaning. We respect your privacy. For more information, please see our Privacy Policy."

title: Contact Us
content: If you have any questions or concerns about our privacy practices, please reach out to us at Info@clensycleaning.com.

title: Questions about our Privacy Policy?
content:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

Phone: (551) 305-4081

Email: Info@clensycleaning.com
